hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,os,re,shutil,pathlib; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cwd=pathlib.Path(d.get('cwd') or os.getcwd()).resolve(); project=re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+','-',cwd.name) or 'project'; raw=d.get('name') or 'worktree'; name=re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+','-',raw).strip('-') or 'worktree'; base=(pathlib.Path.home()/'.claude'/'worktrees'/project).resolve(); base.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True); candidates=[base/name]+[base/f'{name}-{i}' for i in range(2,1000)]; dest=next(p for p in candidates if not p.exists()); shutil.copytree(cwd,dest,ignore=shutil.ignore_patterns('node_modules','dist','.git')); print(dest)"

python -c "import json,sys,os,re,shutil,pathlib; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cwd=pathlib.Path(d.get('cwd') or os.getcwd()).resolve(); project=re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+','-',cwd.name) or 'project'; base=(pathlib.Path.home()/'.claude'/'worktrees'/project).resolve(); raw=d.get('worktree_path'); target=pathlib.Path(raw).expanduser().resolve(strict=False) if raw else None; shutil.rmtree(target) if target and target.exists() and target.is_dir() and (not target.is_symlink()) and (base in target.parents) else None"
